prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-KPL-65PCDIECASTCARSET-FIRE Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio 65pc Fire Truck Diecast Cars Playset for Boys, Ages 3 and Up Description: Get ready for a blazing adventure! Whether it’s racing to put out a roaring inferno or rescuing local citizens from danger, your little firefighter will have everything they need to run their own fire station with this hands on diecast car playset.

Featuring sixty five individual pieces, this playset set features a variety of realistic diecast vehicles designed to bring the world of firefighting to life, each with awesome and vibrant firefighting inspired graphics. This playset includes helicopters, rescue vehicles, a fire truck, fire crane and lots of firefighting accessories. And, with no assembly required, fun pretend play sessions can begin right out of the box!

This captivating fire truck playset gives young imaginations everything they need to create their own action packed rescues; putting out fires, saving the day or transporting firefighters to the scene, this playset makes every rescue feel like an adventure! Sparking curiosity about firefighting, law enforcement and other related fields, kids will love using their imagination, while it encourages them to participate in screen free playtime with family and friends.

Built tough for endless playtime, these fire truck themed diecast cars and accessories are sturdy, safe and ideal for active play; designed with little hands in mind, this diecast cars playset is suitable for children ages three and up.

A dynamic play environment complete with fire trucks, emergency scene accessories, fire hydrants and more for a full rescue experience, let the firefighting adventures begin! Search Terms: Fire truck stem toddler tactile sensory fine motor skills diecast cars gifts for boys birthday presents stocking stuffers race car games pretend play toy vehicle playsets car accessories screen free activities for toddlers toy fire truck Features: - 65PC FIRE TRUCK DIECAST CARS PLAYSET: Calling all little heroes, let the rescuing begin with this awesome fire truck themed diecast cars playset! This playset set features a variety of realistic diecast vehicles designed to bring the world of firefighting to life, no assembly required - FIRE TRUCK TOY: This captivating set includes 65 diecast cars and accessories, each designed with vibrant, firefighting inspired graphics! This playset includes a fire truck, rescue vehicles, helicopters, firefighting accessories and more - DURABLE AND SAFE: Built tough for endless playtime, these fire truck themed diecast cars and accessories are sturdy, safe and ideal for active play; designed with little hands in mind, this diecast cars playset is suitable for children ages three and up - TACTILE TOYS: Whether it’s racing to put out a blazing inferno or rescuing citizens from danger, your little firefighter will have everything they need to run their own fire station with this hands on diecast car playset; sparking curiosity about firefighting, law enforcement and other related fields, kids will love using their imagination, while it encourages them to participate in screen free playtime - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 18 x 14.5 x 2 inches; Weight: 1.62lbs; Note: No Assembly Required === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kidplokio 65pc Fire Truck Diecast Cars Playset
